sources.source: NASA BVAD Rev2 Table 4-1; NASA exploration atmosphere studies

sources.source: NASA BVAD Rev2 Table 4-1; Norcross 2013; NASA-STD-3001
sources.note: Primary source is BVAD Rev2 Table 4-1 (NTRS 20210024855). Also names Norcross 2013 (NASA/TP-2013-217377, 'Space Physiology / Exploration Atmospheres', NTRS 20140012830) and NASA-STD-3001 (https://standards.nasa.gov/standard/NASA/NASA-STD-3001_VOL_2).

sources.source: NASA-STD-3001 Vol 2 Rev D [V2 6004]; NASA OCHMO-TB-004
sources.note: Primary standard NASA-STD-3001 Vol 2 (canonical landing page; current rev E, Rev D historical PDF at https://standards.nasa.gov/sites/default/files/standards/NASA/D/nasa-std-3001-vol-2-rev-d-signature.pdf). Requirement [V2 6004] is the ppCO2 limit. OCHMO-TB-004 Carbon Dioxide technical brief landing page: https://www.nasa.gov/ochmo-tb-004-carbon-dioxide-2/

sources.source: Derived from ICES-2023-311 (46.9 A, ~1.7 V/cell, ~28 cells => 2.23 kW at 9.25 kg/day)

sources.source: Estimate: heaters + blower + valves; +200 W heater at high-flow config (NTRS 20150016500) — derived: 0.8 kW / (4.1 CM x 1.04 kg CO2/day)
sources.note: Estimate whose named underlying doc is NTRS 20150016500 (Knox & Stanley, ICES-2015-165, CDRA optimization). Linking that document.

sources.source: NASA water recovery milestone, 20 Jun 2023
